name: Web app migration
prompt: Migrate this repo to GitHub Actions. It has a client app alongside the .NET backend.
expected_behavior: Detects target repo via `gh repo view --json nameWithOwner`
Stops if target org is not LegalShield
Detects project type as 'web' because package.json is present
Selects LegalShield/internal-events-web as the reference and reports the default
Enumerates reference workflows (ci.yml, deploy.yml) via gh api rather than a hardcoded list
Creates the same two files in target .github/workflows/
Adapts .csproj paths, client app directory names, and repo URL references
Creates all environments present in the reference (sandbox, uat, production, production-2)
Adds reviewer teams as repo collaborators before assigning them as environment reviewers
edge_cases: Reference repo has an extra production-2 environment — must not be hardcoded to 3 envs
Web app may lack a health endpoint — user confirms, skill skips health-check adaptation
